decisions.name: branchIsChangeItem_SL_FirstContact_Detail
decisions.label: 分岐：「初回接点_問い合わせ内容」割り当て対象

decisions.name: branchIsChangeItem_SL_firstsource
decisions.label: 分岐：「SL_初回ソース」割り当て対象

decisions.name: branchIsChangeItemRelInt_SL_about_Axcis2
decisions.label: 分岐：「SL_Axcisについて」の割り当て対象

decisions.label: 分岐：「SL_クラウド契約について」の割り当て対象

formulas.name: setVal_SL_FirstContact_Detail
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.SL_FirstContact_Detail__c}, "Pro3カメラ", "701RC000006tq10YAA", "Pro2カメラ", "701RC000006tq11YAA", "Axcis", "701RC000006tq12YAA", "Scan to BIM/Stages/SIM-ON", "701RC000006tq13YAA", "クラウド契約", "701RC000006tq14YAA", "クラウド契約", "701RC000006tq14YAA", "Scan To BIM", "701RC000006tq13YAA", "実機デモ会希望", "701RC00000AIfa1YAD", "その他", "701RC00000AIbWQYA1", "")

formulas.name: setVal_SL_firstsource
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.SL_firstsource__c}, "イベント", "701RC000006tvgcYAA", "紹介", "701RC000006tvghYAA", "電話", "701RC000006tvggYAA", "WEB問い合わせ", "701RC000006tvgfYAA", "ウェビナー", "701RC000006tvgdYAA", "その他", "701RC000006tvgiYAA", "")

Flow.interviewLabel: 【得意先担当者】指定レコード更新時のCPN割り当て対象 {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: 【得意先担当者】指定レコード更新時のCPN割り当て対象
